summary:
The concept of digital twins can be meaningfully applied in precision nutrition because they integrate personal genomic, metabolic, and lifestyle data into adaptive models supported by wearable technology and artificial intelligence. Despite ongoing limitations in long-term clinical validation and scalability, evolving research demonstrates their potential to enable highly tailored, responsive diet plans grounded in real-world physiological feedback. \boxed{A}

The concept of digital twins can be effectively applied in precision nutrition as it leverages integrated biological and behavioral data from wearables and AI to create dynamic, personalized dietary recommendations. Although clinical validation remains incomplete, accumulating evidence supports its practicality in tailoring nutrition regimens to an individual’s unique physiology. \boxed{A}

The concept of digital twins can be effectively applied in precision nutrition as it leverages integrated biological and behavioral data from wearables and AI to create dynamic, personalized dietary recommendations. Although clinical validation remains incomplete, accumulating evidence supports its practicality in tailoring nutrition regimens to an individual’s unique physiology. \boxed{A}. Answer choice: A
